name: Macrolink Culturaltainment Development Co., Ltd.
summary: Macrolink Culturaltainment Development Co., Ltd. develops real estate properties in China, South Korea, Malaysia, Australia and Canada. The company develops residences, business, office buildings, hotels, and urban complexes. It is also involved in the cultural tourism, finance, real estate, commerce, hospitality, construction, property, entertainment, architectural design, landscaping, and other industries. The company was formerly known as Macrolink Real Estate Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Macrolink Culturaltainment Development Co., Ltd. in August 2016. Macrolink Culturaltainment Development Co., Ltd. was founded in 1993 and is based in Beijing, China. Macrolink Culturaltainment Development Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Macrolink Holding Co., Ltd.
